title: Bridge Essay: Prodromal dreams.
concept: Predictive processing — free energy principle, active inference, Bayesian brain.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.
**Phase context:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, active inference, Bayesian brain.

**Prodromal dreams.** — Front Psychiatry (2025). DOI: 10.3389/fpsyt.2025.1625811. PMID: 40950768. I present a provisional model and promising evidence, pending robust longitudinal validation, for the possibility of prodromal dreams: dreams that predict onset of illness before overt symptoms appear. Interoceptive signals are compressed and summated/integrated within brain networks that are most highly active during REM sleep.
